src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: Java 21 enforces stricter serialization checks; without @Serial, the code may fail to compile or produce warnings depending on the compiler configuration (e.g., --enable-preview or strict linting).

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation.
